creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: fluffy
Date: Tue Jul  7 03:15:19 UTC 2020
New revision: 541383
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/541383

Log:
  Update LibreOffice suite to 6.4.5 release

  QT5 VCL fixes:
  - Reduce startup flickering
  - Always use cairo font renderer

  Special thanks to:	tijl

  PR:		247444
